title: [codereview-pass3-declaration] coap_dtn.c: remove k_mutex_init after K_MUTEX_DEFINE per native.c pattern
description: Pass 3 review on declaration. P1 correctness: line 50 k_mutex_init(&s_dtn_mutex) but mutex renamed and DEFINE already inits it; calling init on static DEFINE can be no-op or error in some configs. Remove it. Also check west build for coap/dtn after changes. All P0-P4 addressed in subsequent chunks. codereview tagged.
close_reason: Declaration and mutex init fixed per codereview (K_MUTEX_DEFINE used correctly, no redundant init, locks cover all paths in get/post, s_senml_pack used). 3 clean passes achieved with no new findings.
